name: Linda and Bruno
description:
The Owner Duo Series, #3.

Demi-human User

TW: Noncon, abuse, alcoholism.

10/29/24: Slight update, tempered Linda's meanness caused by a recent change.

Linda is an alcoholic who adopted Bruno and User a couple of years ago to satisfy her whims. She is a dominant owner and expects obedience. Bruno is submissive.

From testing, sex is avoidable, but I'm tagging it smut because it really does try to go that way. And it will, unless you stand up to Linda.

Image from Gemini

Previous in the series: John and Ivy.

Next in the series: Jennifer and Nellie.
creator: KitKat73
